images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful young Japanese gravure idol exuding a cool and distant steampunk allure, captured from an over-the-shoulder shot on a sandy beach shoreline. She wears a form-fitting, intricate blazer and pencil skirt ensemble featuring velvet textures and brass buckles that accentuate her slim waist and curvy figure, perfectly tailored to enhance her silhouette. The atmosphere is dark and moody with cinematic high contrast and sharp grading, yet her face is illuminated by professional butterfly lighting that highlights her flawless skin texture, visible pores, and large expressive eyes against the gloom. She holds a vintage coffee cup, gazing out at the turbulent sea with a seductive, aloof expression, while the background creates a aesthetic bokeh. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination.8k photo, Large breasts, deep cleavage, ample cleavage, sexy photo, beautilful girl without makeup
